publishedAbstract: In the event the [Storage optimization using Ceph Autoscaler and a Target Size Ratio for PG Increase/Placement on Large Pools- OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) v4.19+](https://access.redhat.com/articles/6974458) solution was implemented, it is recommended to remove these configurations before an ODF v4.21 upgrade. Failure to remove the target ratio from the pools will result in these target ratios becoming permanent with no ability to revert.
publishedTitle: Remove Target Ratio from OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) Cluster Prior to ODF v4.21 Upgrade or it Becomes Permanent
